summary: Tested new Vastgoed Kiosk ERP features: Bank/Kas tab, Werknemers tab, and overdue_months display. All backend APIs working correctly. Fixed public tenants endpoint to include overdue_months and rent_billed_through fields.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Werknemer employee and TEST_Income kas entry for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Huurders tab shows overdue_months in red text, 2) Bank/Kas tab with income/expense tracking and totals, 3) Werknemers tab with employee CRUD and salary payment, 4) Kiosk tenant overview shows 'Gefactureerd t/m' and overdue months. Fixed public tenants endpoint to return overdue_months array.

backend_apis.notes: Fixed to return overdue_months and rent_billed_through

frontend_ui.notes: Shows 'Achterstand: april 2026, mei 2026' in red text
Shows Totale Inkomsten, Totale Uitgaven, Kassaldo
Shows employee list with Totaal Maandloon and Totaal Uitbetaald
Shows 'Gefactureerd t/m' and overdue months after fix

bug_fix_applied.description: Added overdue_months and rent_billed_through fields to GET /public/{company_id}/tenants endpoint so Kiosk tenant overview can display which months are overdue
